sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the initial state of level 2
for entry in history:
    if entry.frame.level == 2:
        seg = entry.frame.segmentation
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'S':
                b = n['boundary']
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"Initial square: top-left=({min(rows)},{min(cols)}), action={entry.action}")
                break
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the first frame of level 2 (before any actions)
# Check transitions for level change
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    if t.before_frame.level != t.after_frame.level:
        print(f"Level change at transition {i}: {t.before_frame.level} -> {t.after_frame.level}")
        # Show the after_frame (new level)
        seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'S':
                b = n['boundary']
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"  Square: top-left=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
